dublinCore.dc:title: 117 HRES 62 EH: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Members be, and are hereby, elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Costa, Mr. McGovern, Mr. Vela, Ms. Adams, Ms. Spanberger, Mrs. Hayes, Mr. Delgado, Mr. Rush, Ms. Pingree, Mr. Sablan, Ms. Kuster, Mrs. Bustos, Mr. Sean Patrick Maloney of New York, Ms. Plaskett, Mr. O'Halleran, Mr. Carbajal, Mr. Khanna, Mr. Lawson of Florida, Mr. Correa, Ms. Craig, Mr. Harder of California, Mrs. Axne, Ms. Schrier.

Ms. Kaptur, Mr. Price of North Carolina, Ms. Roybal-Allard, Mr. Bishop of Georgia, Ms. Lee of California, Ms. McCollum, Mr. Ryan, Mr. Ruppersberger, Ms. Wasserman Schultz, Mr. Cuellar, Ms. Pingree, Mr. Quigley, Mr. Kilmer, Mr. Cartwright, Ms. Meng, Mr. Pocan, Ms. Clark of Massachusetts, Mr. Aguilar, Ms. Lois Frankel of Florida, Mrs. Bustos, Mrs. Watson Coleman, Mrs. Lawrence, Mrs. Torres of California, Mr. Crist, Mrs. Kirkpatrick, Mr. Case, Mr. Espaillat, Mr. Harder of California, Ms. Wexton, Mr. Trone, Ms. Underwood, Mrs. Lee of Nevada.

Mr. Langevin, Mr. Larsen of Washington, Mr. Cooper, Mr. Courtney, Mr. Garamendi, Ms. Speier, Mr. Norcross, Mr. Gallego, Mr. Moulton, Mr. Carbajal, Mr. Brown, Mr. Khanna, Mr. Keating, Mr. Vela, Mr. Kim of New Jersey, Ms. Houlahan, Mr. Crow, Ms. Slotkin, Ms. Sherrill, Ms. Escobar, Mr. Golden, Mrs. Luria, Mr. Morelle, Ms. Jacobs of California, Mr. Kahele, Ms. Strickland, Mr. Veasey, Mr. Panetta, Mrs. Murphy of Florida.

Mr. Jeffries, Mr. Higgins of New York, Mr. Brendan F. Boyle of Pennsylvania, Mr. Doggett, Mr. Price of North Carolina, Ms. Schakowsky, Mr. Kildee, Mr. Morelle, Mr. Horsford, Ms. Lee of California, Ms. Chu, Ms. Plaskett, Ms. Wexton, Mr. Scott of Virginia, Ms. Jackson Lee, Mr. Cooper, Mr. Sires, Mr. Peters, Mr. Moulton, Ms. Jayapal.

Mr. Grijalva, Mr. Courtney, Mr. Sablan, Ms. Wilson of Florida, Ms. Bonamici, Mr. Takano, Ms. Adams, Mr. DeSaulnier, Mr. Norcross, Ms. Jayapal, Mr. Morelle, Ms. Wild, Mrs. McBath, Mrs. Hayes, Mr. Levin of Michigan, Ms. Omar, Ms. Stevens, Ms. Leger Fernandez, Mr. Jones, Ms. Manning, Mr. Mrvan, Mr. Bowman, Mr. Pocan, Mr. Castro of Texas, Ms. Sherrill.

Mr. Rush, Ms. Eshoo, Ms. DeGette, Mr. Michael F. Doyle of Pennsylvania, Ms. Schakowsky, Mr. Butterfield, Ms. Matsui, Ms. Castor of Florida, Mr. Sarbanes, Mr. McNerney, Mr. Welch, Mr. Tonko, Ms. Clarke of New York, Mr. Schrader, Mr. Cárdenas, Mr. Ruiz, Mr. Peters, Mrs. Dingell, Mr. Veasey, Ms. Kuster, Ms. Kelly of Illinois, Ms. Barragán, Mr. McEachin, Ms. Blunt Rochester, Mr. Soto, Mr. O'Halleran, Miss Rice of New York, Ms. Craig, Ms. Schrier, Mrs. Trahan, Mrs. Fletcher.
Ms. Wild, Mr. Phillips, Ms. Escobar, Mr. Jones.

Mrs. Carolyn B. Maloney of New York, Ms. Velázquez, Mr. Sherman, Mr. Meeks, Mr. Green of Texas, Mr. Cleaver, Mr. Perlmutter, Mr. Himes, Mr. Foster, Mrs. Beatty, Mr. Vargas, Mr. Gottheimer, Mr. Vicente Gonzalez of Texas, Mr. Lawson of Florida, Mr. San Nicolas, Mrs. Axne, Mr. Casten, Ms. Pressley, Mr. Torres of New York, Mr. David Scott of Georgia, Mr. Lynch, Ms. Adams, Ms. Tlaib, Ms. Dean, Ms. Ocasio-Cortez, Mr. García of Illinois, Ms. Garcia of Texas, Ms. Williams of Georgia, Mr. Auchincloss.

Mr. Sherman, Mr. Sires, Mr. Connolly, Mr. Deutch, Ms. Bass, Mr. Keating, Mr. Cicilline, Mr. Bera, Mr. Castro of Texas, Ms. Titus, Mr. Lieu, Ms. Wild, Mr. Phillips, Ms. Omar, Mr. Allred, Mr. Levin of Michigan, Ms. Spanberger, Ms. Houlahan, Mr. Malinowski, Mr. Kim of New Jersey, Ms. Jacobs of California, Ms. Manning, Mr. Costa, Mr. Vargas, Mr. Vicente Gonzalez of Texas, Mr. Schneider.

Ms. Jackson Lee, Mr. Langevin, Mr. Payne, Mr. Correa, Ms. Slotkin, Mr. Cleaver, Mr. Green of Texas, Ms. Clarke of New York, Mr. Swalwell, Ms. Titus, Mrs. Watson Coleman, Miss Rice of New York, Mrs. Demings, Ms. Barragán, Mr. Gottheimer, Mrs. Luria, Mr. Malinowski, Mr. Torres of New York.
Mr. Raskin, Mr. Butterfield, Mr. Aguilar, Ms. Scanlon, Ms. Leger Fernandez.

Ms. Lofgren, Ms. Jackson Lee, Mr. Cohen, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Mr. Deutch, Ms. Bass, Mr. Jeffries, Mr. Cicilline, Mr. Swalwell, Mr. Lieu, Mr. Raskin, Ms. Jayapal, Mrs. Demings, Mr. Correa, Ms. Scanlon, Ms. Garcia of Texas, Mr. Neguse, Mrs. McBath, Mr. Stanton, Ms. Dean, Ms. Escobar, Mr. Jones, Ms. Ross, Ms. Bush.

Mrs. Napolitano, Mr. Costa, Mr. Sablan, Mr. Huffman, Mr. Lowenthal, Mr. Gallego, Mr. Neguse, Mr. Levin of California, Ms. Porter, Ms. Leger Fernandez, Ms. Velázquez, Ms. DeGette, Ms. Brownley, Mrs. Dingell, Mr. McEachin, Mr. Soto, Mr. San Nicolas, Mr. García of Illinois, Mr. Case.

Ms. Norton, Mr. Lynch, Mr. Cooper, Mr. Connolly, Mr. Krishnamoorthi, Mr. Raskin, Mr. Khanna, Mr. Mfume, Ms. Ocasio-Cortez, Ms. Tlaib, Ms. Porter, Ms. Bush, Mr. Danny K. Davis of Illinois, Ms. Wasserman Schultz, Mr. Welch, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Mr. Sarbanes, Ms. Speier, Ms. Kelly of Illinois, Mrs. Lawrence, Mr. DeSaulnier, Mr. Gomez, Ms. Pressley.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Science, Space, and Technology:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Lofgren, Ms. Bonamici, Mr. Bera, Ms. Stevens, Ms. Sherrill, Mr. Bowman, Mr. Sherman, Mr. Perlmutter, Mr. McNerney, Mr. Tonko, Mr. Foster, Mr. Norcross, Mr. Beyer, Mr. Crist, Mr. Casten, Mr. Lamb, Ms. Ross.
Mr. Golden, Mr. Crow, Ms. Davids of Kansas, Mr. Mfume, Mr. Phillips, Ms. Newman, Ms. Bourdeaux, Ms. Chu, Mr. Peters, Mr. Evans, Mr. Delgado, Ms. Houlahan, Mr. Kim of New Jersey, Ms. Craig.

Ms. Norton, Ms. Johnson of Texas, Mr. Larsen of Washington, Mrs. Napolitano, Mr. Cohen, Mr. Sires, Mr. Garamendi, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Mr. Carson, Ms. Titus, Mr. Sean Patrick Maloney of New York, Mr. Huffman, Ms. Brownley, Ms. Wilson of Florida, Mr. Payne, Mr. Lowenthal, Mr. DeSaulnier, Mr. Lynch, Mr. Carbajal, Mr. Brown, Mr. Malinowski, Mr. Stanton, Mr. Allred, Ms. Davids of Kansas, Mr. García of Illinois, Mr. Delgado, Mr. Pappas, Mr. Lamb, Mr. Moulton, Mr. Auchincloss, Ms. Bourdeaux, Mr. Kahele, Ms. Strickland, Ms. Williams of Georgia, Ms. Newman.
Ms. Brownley, Mr. Lamb, Mr. Levin of California, Mr. Pappas, Mrs. Luria, Mr. Mrvan, Mr. Sablan, Ms. Underwood, Mr. Allred.

Mr. Doggett, Mr. Thompson of California, Mr. Larson of Connecticut, Mr. Blumenauer, Mr. Kind, Mr. Pascrell, Mr. Danny K. Davis of Illinois, Ms. Sánchez, Mr. Higgins of New York, Ms. Sewell, Ms. DelBene, Ms. Chu, Ms. Moore of Wisconsin, Mr. Kildee, Mr. Brendan F.
